name: BTActionAS_ActivateAbility
brief_description: BTAction that activates an Ability System ability by tag.
description:
A Behavior Tree action that attempts to activate an ability via [ASComponent] using the ability's tag. Returns [constant BT.SUCCESS] if activation succeeds, [constant BT.FAILURE] otherwise.
		This task respects all ability requirements: tags, cooldowns, costs, and level restrictions.

properties.name: ability_tag
properties.description: The tag of the ability to activate.

properties.name: activation_level
properties.description: The level at which to activate the ability.

properties.name: asc_node_path
properties.description: Explicit path to ASComponent. Auto-resolved if empty.
